## Description

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / mod detection improvement
- [ ] UI change (tablet or HUD)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other:

## Testing

- [ ] Builds without errors (`dotnet build src/MoonModChecker.csproj -c Release`)
- [ ] Tested in-game (describe what you verified)
- [ ] No new warnings introduced

**Test notes:**

## Checklist

- [ ] No emojis added to code, comments, or UI strings
- [ ] No compiled DLL committed (unless this is an intentional release artifact)
- [ ] Changes are scoped to what is described above
- [ ] Logs or screenshots attached if this is a UI or detection change
